creator: des@flood.ping.uio.no
text:
Andrew Cagney <cagney@tpgi.com.au> writes:
> * New bind (named), no compatibility mode, no obvious doco:
> 
> Another big jump.  Bind changes and there isn't a quick/easy way to
> revert to the old bind while the new config file is being built.
> (Fortunately the new bind does come up in a vaguely sane state :-).

If you have the sources installed, there is a script for converting
named.boot to named.conf:

/usr/src/contrib/bind/bin/named/named-bootconf.pl

I guess perhaps it should be copied to /etc/named or somesuch place by
make installworld.

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smorgrav - des@flood.ping.uio.no
